scope.note: Prepared as a CORRIDOR/ROUTE ONLY batch; no corridor aliases were needed because eight higher-confidence route-only candidates were available.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global route: both records are B17 local service in Brooklyn/Eastern Parkway context. The target already merges the same B17 local route from CB9 April 2025 and meeting_doc_160441 evidence; the alias is the CB8 April 2025 instance of the same route.

Same global route: both records are B60 local bus service in Brooklyn. The alias is a one-source B60 local mention from the B82 South Brooklyn CB18 June 2017 deck; the target is the broader B60 route record with ten source contexts and the same route/service variant.

Same global route: both records are B69 local service in Brooklyn/Flatbush Avenue context. The alias is a single CB2 June 2025 B69 local route record; the target is the multi-source B69 local Flatbush Avenue route record.

Same global route: both records are B69 local service in Brooklyn/Flatbush Avenue context. The alias describes potential B69 reroutes; the target already represents the same B69 local route across Flatbush Avenue sources.

Same global route grouping: both records identify X28/X38 express bus service on the Bay Parkway/Cropsey Avenue corridor, with identical route_id and express service variant. The alias is the November 2024 instance; the target is the January 2025 instance.

Same global route grouping: both records identify X28/X38 express bus service on the Bay Parkway/Cropsey Avenue corridor, with identical route_id and express service variant. The alias is the CB12 June 2025 instance; the target is the January 2025 instance.

Same global route: both records are Q58 local service in Queens. The alias is a one-source Q58 Bus Route record from meeting_doc_115256; the target is the broader Q58 local route record with eleven source contexts.

Same global route: both records are BxM1 express bus service. The alias is a single June 2025 116th Street study-area BxM1 express record; the target is the broader BxM1 express route record with nine source contexts.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, routes.route_id, json_extract(r.payload,'$.service_variant') as service_variant, routes.route_type_normalized, (select count(*) from record_sources rs where rs.record_id=r.record_id) as source_count from records r join routes on r.record_id=routes.record_id where r.record_id in ('route_b17-eastern-pkwy-cb8-apr2025','route_b17-eastern-pkwy-apr2025','route_b60-cb18-jun2017','route_b60','route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2-jun2025','route_b69-flatbush-sept2025','route_b69-flatbush-ave-apr2026','route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy-nov2024','route_x28-x38-express-cb12-jun2025','route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy','route_meeting-doc-115256-q58','route_q58','route_bxm1-jun2025','route_bxm1') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 14/14 selected alias and target records exist; every selected record has record_kind=route. Route IDs and variants match within each proposed pair: B17/local, B60/local, B69/local, X28/X38/express, Q58/local, and BxM1/express.

existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='route' and alias in ('route_b17-eastern-pkwy-cb8-apr2025','route_b60-cb18-jun2017','route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2-jun2025','route_b69-flatbush-sept2025','route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy-nov2024','route_x28-x38-express-cb12-jun2025','route_meeting-doc-115256-q58','route_bxm1-jun2025');"
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in canonical identity_aliases

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (values ('route_b17-eastern-pkwy-cb8-apr2025','route_b17-eastern-pkwy-apr2025'),('route_b60-cb18-jun2017','route_b60'),('route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2-jun2025','route_b69-flatbush-ave-apr2026'),('route_b69-flatbush-sept2025','route_b69-flatbush-ave-apr2026'),('route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy-nov2024','route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy'),('route_x28-x38-express-cb12-jun2025','route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy'),('route_meeting-doc-115256-q58','route_q58'),('route_bxm1-jun2025','route_bxm1')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='route' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs.route[]? | select((.record_ids | index("route_b17-eastern-pkwy-cb8-apr2025") and index("route_b17-eastern-pkwy-apr2025")) or (.record_ids | index("route_b60-cb18-jun2017") and index("route_b60")) or (.record_ids | index("route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2-jun2025") and index("route_b69-flatbush-ave-apr2026")) or (.record_ids | index("route_b69-flatbush-sept2025") and index("route_b69-flatbush-ave-apr2026")) or (.record_ids | index("route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy-nov2024") and index("route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy")) or (.record_ids | index("route_x28-x38-express-cb12-jun2025") and index("route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy")) or (.record_ids | index("route_meeting-doc-115256-q58") and index("route_q58")) or (.record_ids | index("route_bxm1-jun2025") and index("route_bxm1"))) | .record_ids|@tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity102.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-2]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="route") | select(.alias_id as $a | ["route_b17-eastern-pkwy-cb8-apr2025","route_b60-cb18-jun2017","route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2-jun2025","route_b69-flatbush-sept2025","route_x28-x38-bay-pkwy-nov2024","route_x28-x38-express-cb12-jun2025","route_meeting-doc-115256-q58","route_bxm1-jun2025"] | index($a)) | [$f,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity102.result: no output; none of the proposed aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch102

source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: Selected records have source evidence refs for the same route labels; examples include B17 current route/map evidence, B60 route mentions, B69 Flatbush route/reroute evidence, X28/X38 Express bus evidence, Q58 route evidence, and BxM1 express-route list evidence.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. No canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: rg, jq, sqlite3, sed/head for read-only file inspection, pwd, and date.
